notes: Canonical = Claude-native form; adapters are transforms OF Claude artifacts. Targets: Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot. Tool types: skills, agents/subagents, slash commands, shared scripts/references. Emitter + scripts on Bun+TypeScript (CON-01; repo has no package.json yet). Adapters committed in-repo under adapters/<target>/ (CON-02), generated + per-target override slots that survive rebuild. Discovery via explicit tool manifest (single source feeding emitter + drift guard). Per-target transform rules; best-effort fallback for unsupported constructs. Idempotent re-run AND byte-stable output are P0 (REQ-EMIT-05/06) backing a local+CI drift guard. Validation: drift guard, schema validation, golden snapshots, coverage report. Canonical side packaged as installable Claude plugin (P1). Reusable across repos (P1). MVP = structure + emitter + 1 sample tool emitting to all 4 targets. OUT OF SCOPE: actual doc tools' content, doc-site generator feature, publishing/release automation, standalone CLI. Reference feature-forge's own adapters/ for transform rules. TECH DECISIONS (v1): Port feature-forge's build-adapters.py design to Bun+TS matching rauf (vitest, Zod + zod-to-json-schema, ESLint9, Prettier). Canon at repo root (skills/agents/commands/references/scripts). Manifest = tools.manifest.json (JSON, Zod-validated, committed JSON Schema). Overrides = separate overrides/<target>/ tree, file-level replace (distinguishable from emitted; closes OQ-03 at file-level). Transforms: reuse feature-forge skill/agent table verbatim; slash commands native on Claude/Cursor, best-effort fallback elsewhere (exact formats = TQ-1 for specs). Validation: drift guard primary (re-emit+diff, overrides merged, orphan detection per REQ-EMIT-08); golden snapshots scoped to MVP sample SKILL; coverage report each build. MVP sample tool = one simple skill (resolves OQ-04). Reuse: config-driven/path-agnostic in-repo, no extracted CLI (OOS-04). Open: TQ-1 (per-target command formats + copilot manifest), TQ-2 (codex structural agent keys), TQ-3 (skill metadata/allowed-tools), TQ-4 (manifest<->source cross-check), OQ-05 (plugin manifest specifics). SPECS (v1): 9 docs (00-08) + TRACEABILITY.md. Open questions resolved: OQ-03 file-level override replace (05), OQ-04 sample = simple docs-helper skill (07), OQ-05 .claude-plugin manifests (07), TQ-1/TQ-2 grounded in 2026 target-format research (04: Codex agents + Gemini commands are TOML, Copilot uses .agent.md/.prompt.md/.instructions.md, AGENTS.md cross-target fallback), TQ-3 skill metadata in SkillRecord (03), TQ-4 manifest<->source cross-check (02). Added smol-toml runtime dep for byte-stable TOML. Drift guard covers adapters/ + .claude-plugin/. Traceability: 31 reqs, 0 orphaned, only REQ-PERF-01 (P2 non-target) uncovered. CARRY-FORWARD WARNINGS for impl: Codex per-agent tool key + skills path + prompts deprecation; Cursor command arg syntax unconfirmed; Gemini GEMINI.md frontmatter; Copilot mode-vs-agent; smol-toml key ordering must be deterministic.
